      About this item

      • 65 Hours Playtime: Low power consumption technology applied, BERIBES bluetooth headphones with built-in 500mAh battery can continually play more than 65 hours, standby more than 950 hours after one fully charge. By included 3.5mm audio cable, the wireless headphones over ear can be easily switched to wired mode when powers off. No power shortage problem anymore.
      • Optional 6 Music Modes: Adopted most advanced dual 40mm dynamic sound unit and 6 EQ modes, BERIBES updated headphones wireless bluetooth black were born for audiophiles. Simply switch the headphone between balanced sound, extra powerful bass and mid treble enhancement modes. No matter you prefer rock, Jazz, Rhythm & Blues or classic music, BERIBES has always been committed to providing our customers with good sound quality as the focal point of our engineering.
      • All Day Comfort: Made by premium materials, 0.38lb BERIBES over the ear headphones wireless bluetooth for work are the most lightweight headphones in the market. Adjustable headband makes it easy to fit all sizes heads without pains. Softer and more comfortable memory protein earmuffs protect your ears in long term using.
      • Latest Bluetooth 6.0 and Microphone: Carrying latest Bluetooth 6.0 chip, after booting, 1-3 seconds to quickly pair bluetooth. Beribes bluetooth headphones with microphone has faster and more stable transmitter range up to 33ft. Two smart devices can be connected to Beribes over-ear headphones at the same time, makes you able to pick up a call from your phones when watching movie on your pad without switching.（There are updates for both the old and new Bluetooth versions, but this will not affect the quality of the product or its normal use.）
      • Packaging Component: Package include a Foldable Deep Bass Headphone, 3.5MM Audio Cable, Type-c Charging Cable and User Manual.

      Next set of slides

      Product description

      Enjoy Your Favorite Music Like Never Before, With These Exquisite Headphones Brought To You By BERIBES !

      The BERIBES Bluetooth headphones will give you a deep, powerful, and immersive sound at any volume, make your overall listening experience just that much better. Our goal has always been committed to providing our customers with better sound quality as the focal point of our engineering.

      Are you looking for a high-end quality pair of headphones to enjoy your music, movies, and games? Have you tried similar products in the past but were let down by how flimsy they were or by how quickly they stopped working? Would you opt for an earphone set that is durable, heavy duty, and doesn’t cost you a month’s salary?

      If so, then this is your lucky day, because BERIBES has just the thing you’re looking for !

      How to connect headphones wirelessly by Bluetooth?

      Long press the O button for 4S to start the headphones until it enters the Bluetooth pairing mode ,red and blue lights flash alternately,then use the device you need to connect to search, find the Bluetooth pairing name“WH202A ”and click Connect.

      （The TV needs to have Bluetooth pairing function or some types of Bluetooth transmitters to be wirelessly connected and used. Headphones need to be kept at a distance of no more than 10 meters from Bluetooth devices. If they are too far away or blocked by doors or walls, it will also interfere with the Bluetooth signal. Our headphones have a 1-to-2 pairing function. If you don't need to switch between using two Bluetooth devices, turn off the Bluetooth of one of the devices. To connect to Bluetooth, you need to hold down the power button for a few seconds until the red and blue lights start flashing, which indicates the pairing status. Also, our headphones are not gaming headphones, so it is not recommended to connect them with PS4/PS5 and the like）Notice: Long press for next or previous track，click for volume up and down.The ear cups are divided into left and right sides, with the letters "R" and "L" on them. Wearing them upside down will not fit your ears tightly. Charge with a type-c charging cable. Do not expose the headphones to direct sunlight for a long time or soak them directly for cleaning. When in standby mode, the headphones have a flashing blue light.)

      Multipoint Connection

      Connect to two Bluetooth devices at the same time to switch between calls, games, listening to music, and more without needing to reconnect. Provide a more convenient use experience.

      High Quality Headphone

      BERIBES 6EQ Headphones are made of high quality materials, which enable our products to have a longer service life, more upscale look, better texture, better function.

      Rotatable and Foldable

      Foldable and rotatable design makes the headset suitable whether it is placed in a backpack or hung around the neck. Make it easier to carry around.

      Comfort Fit

      Only 0.38lb bluetooth headphones and memory protein earmuff provide all day comfort for ears and head, and unique earcup design allows the headphones to fit better in the ear.

      HD Microphone

      Built-in HD microphone supported by exclusive technology provides a clearer and more soundproof call experience during calls, as if talking face to face with relatives and friends.

      Wired Mode

      If you suddenly have no power during use, you can plug included 3.5mm audio cable to complete a seamless toggle, and enjoy uninterrupted music anytime anywhere.

      Key Specifications

      Mode: 6EQ Modes (Pop、Rock、Vocal、Jazz、BassUp、Classic )

      Bluetooth Version: V 6.0

      Impedance: 32Ω±15%

      Driver (Full Range): 2 × 40 mm

      Frequency Response: 20Hz~30kHz

      Range: 33ft

      Sensitivity: 116.4±3dB

      Charge Time: 2-2.5 Hours

      Use a 5.0V==1.0A (or higher than 1.0A) charger to charge BERIBES headphones wireless bluetooth

      Compatible: Phone, MP3, MP4, Pc, Laptops, Android and other bluetooth devices.

      How to Use Smart One Connect Two：

      1. Make sure the over ear headphones have been connected to the first Bluetooth device successfully.

      2. Turn off the first device's Bluetooth.

      3. Turn on the second device's Bluetooth, find the "WH202A” and select it to pair with your device.

      4. Turn on the first device's Bluetooth and select "WH202A" to pair it again.now your headset is connected to the 2 devices at the same time.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these headphones comfortable, with one noting they don't hurt their ears at all, and appreciate their long-lasting battery that charges quickly. They are easy to pair via Bluetooth and work reliably, with good sound quality and value for money. The noise cancellation feature receives mixed reviews, with some finding it good while others say it's not effective.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      TLDR: Wow
      Not much of a review writer, but I spent days agonizing over buying these vs something more expensive. Hopefully this will help someone stress less 👍 TLDR: Just try them. Get them as a gift even! These are far past anyone’s expectations of $20 head huggers!!! Now… (for longevity, just know I’ve had these since mid December and use them daily) ———————————— These are so great… hands down. They aren’t gonna blow you away as they are only $20-23’s, but I also have SkullCandy Crushers evo, Apple AirPod pro 2s, and random other wired buds and THESE are by far my favorite. Pros: -1 I can wear these 24/7. They are feather light; not in a cheaply-made way, but in a very intentional way. I can actually FORGET I have these on. Really. The AirPods hurt after several hours or even start to slide out. My Crushers literally hurt just to put them on and I have a tiny head! But THESE!!! They are such a joy to wear!!! -2 The Bluetooth connection just WORKS! I cannot understand how THESE headphones accomplish this when Apple and SC cannot! Apple pairs fine, but then randomly starts playing sound from another device all the time. Messing with settings is irritating and still it just starts playing audio from random iOS drives in the house! On the other hand, the Crushers have to be cleared in order to connect to a new device. Every time. I almost sent them back cause I assumed they were broke, but no. Apple struggles with it and you have to “forget the device” every single time you want to say, go from your phone to an iPad (then back again). It’s madness. Some big brain thought this was a good idea.. These $20 ones; you power them on and BAM it connects and STAYS connected! If it doesn’t automatically connect, I just tap the name and it’s instant. 🤯 -3 The mic is fantastic. I’ve only used it in my home, but ppl tell me it’s crystal clear. -4 The easy eq on the side! No apps to download etc. just push it and it cycles through predetermined settings. And these settings actually make a diff. If you want to listen to an instrumental track, don’t leave it in “bass” setting cause you will automatically think it’s the headphones and they are garbage. NO! Shame on you for blaming them lol -5 I’m not sure how to describe it as I’m not knowledgeable in audio devices (audiophile?), but what I also love about these is the spacial depth of sound. Some music just has the ability to surround you with these things in a way no other devices does. Even the AirPods with “spacial audio” can’t seem to replicate these “vast” atmospheric sounds at times. Of course this also relies heavily on the audio, but wow. -6 They fold so well. At first you might think, these things are flipping around everywhere and going to break.. nope. They just effortlessly fold in on themselves. I am rough on headphones too as a busy mom. They get tossed in my giant mom-backpack daily with no case or cover, squished between iPads etc and they are holding up like a champ! -7 I clean house in them for hours in the day and make/take calls as well. Not once have I received a low battery warning. They also have USB-C!!!!! For $20 I wouldn’t have expected that, and they charge incredibly fast. -8 The price. Omg the price lol I just spent more than $20 at McDonald’s. -9 They come packaged SO nice. It’s no iOS unboxing experience, but ordering anything online has me jaded lately. I fully expected these to just be in a plain box with some Chinese wording, with lots of bubble wrap, but no. It comes in a simple, well made, cardboard cube, but it has bright colors and a presentation value that’s hard to get online with cheap electronics. -10 the giant L/R on the inside! I never realized how many times I have flipped headphones and ear buds all around to figure out which was left ear and which was right. I never even knew I needed this in my life! It’s just another little detail that they didn’t HAVE to even bother with, but the details on these things seemed to matter to the designer and/or company. CONS: -1 They don’t get loud enough for me. Going from AirPods shooting sound waves into my ear canal and Crushers literally made to rattle from bass, directly to these can be frustrating as I have to just put them on max volume immediately. Is it a drastic volume issue? Absolutely not in my opinion. It’s just the ONE thing for me keeping these from being a god-tier S++++++ rating. Hell, this might even be considered a PRO feature, as I’m sure all my other devices are chipping away at my hearing one day at a time… -2 There IS no second con lol seriously. Conclusion: I have a white pair, bought my husband the black pair and am about to purchase my teen a pair. THAT is how much I love these and why I just HAD to write a literal essay about the brand.
      MoreHide
      Thank you for your feedback
      Sorry, there was an error

      Top reviews from the United States

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Josephine Carrillo
        5.0 out of 5 stars Awesome value for the price!
        Reviewed in the United States on February 25, 2026
        Color: GreenVerified Purchase
        Firstly, the color is soon cute, and exactly as pictured. I am so in love with the aesthetic of them. They also came fully charged, which was awesome so I got to use them immediately.

        Secondly, the quality is super good so far. Whether listening to podcasts, rap, or metal music, the sound quality has been perfect. They are compatible with both my switch 2 and my phone which is to be expected, but still happy there were no surprises or difficulties there.

        They aren't exactly noise canceling though. When they're on with no sound playing, other sounds are just dulled ever so slightly. When sound is playing, you can still hear people talking and other sounds like fans, but outside sounds aren't obtrusive and are blocked fairly well.

        I also really like how big the ear holes in the pads are, I wasn't expecting that. My whole ear fits inside them, which makes them super comfortable since they aren't smooshing the tops of my ears into the arms of my glasses. It also makes them really comfortable to wear while laying down, again because they don't smoosh my ears.

        I haven't had them long enough to really put them through the paces on charging or audio hours, but I will come back to add to this review a little later to comment on that.

        So far, so amazingly good! Super pleased with the quality for the price I paid.
        Read more

        5.0 out of 5 stars
        Awesome value for the price!

        Reviewed in the United States on February 25, 2026
        Firstly, the color is soon cute, and exactly as pictured. I am so in love with the aesthetic of them. They also came fully charged, which was awesome so I got to use them immediately.

        Secondly, the quality is super good so far. Whether listening to podcasts, rap, or metal music, the sound quality has been perfect. They are compatible with both my switch 2 and my phone which is to be expected, but still happy there were no surprises or difficulties there.

        They aren't exactly noise canceling though. When they're on with no sound playing, other sounds are just dulled ever so slightly. When sound is playing, you can still hear people talking and other sounds like fans, but outside sounds aren't obtrusive and are blocked fairly well.

        I also really like how big the ear holes in the pads are, I wasn't expecting that.       • Pippa
        5.0 out of 5 stars Good pair of headphones
        Reviewed in the United States on February 13, 2026
        Color: Orange redVerified Purchase
        For an inexpensive pair of headphones, I’d say it was a good investment. The sound quality is very clear, although songs like Golden Hour the instruments could sound more crisp.

        They do not fully cancel noise, however, but do block out some. They can also reach high volumes without becoming tinny, although I have never used at full blast to avoid bursting an eardrum 😂

        They are very comfortable and light weight. I just wish they fit on my neck better because they are very right.

        I also love the color- it’s so bright and fun! That is partially why I went with this brand, too. They connect very well to my iPhone, too.

        While there are better headphones, I would recommend if you don’t want to spend a bunch of money. They will work and don’t break in a month and you’ll overall have a fairly good sound.

      • Meredith Miller
        5.0 out of 5 stars Even Better than the $$ Brands!!
        Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
        Color: Orange redVerified Purchase
        5.0 out of 5 stars – Incredible Value! Almost gives my Beats a run for their money!

        I can't gate keep any longer! I am absolutely blown away by these BERIBES headphones! I’ll be honest: I used a pair of Beats Pro for two years, so my standards for audio are pretty high. While these aren't 100% identical to the $200+ flagship brands, for this price point, they are definitely in the race!

        Here is why I love them:

        Insane Battery Life: The 65-hour playtime is no joke. I feel like I rarely have to charge them, which is a huge upgrade from my previous sets. When I do charge them, they charge fairly quickly (about 1 hour to full charge).

        Custom Sound: Having 6 EQ modes is a game-changer. Whether I’m listening to a podcast or bass-heavy music, I can actually tune the headphones to match the vibe from Rock, Vocal, Jazz, Bass, Classic, or Pop. As a graduate student, I listen to a lot of binaural sounds and music as I study. These headphones can handle to different frequencies in each ear that binaural requires. They also cancel out pretty much all background noise, even though they do not advertise that

        Comfort: They are super lightweight and comfortable for long sessions. The deep cup fits over my ear so well, there is never fabric touching my actual skin. My ears do not get irritated or sweaty during long-term use, and they are comfortable enough for falling asleep while wearing! The also swivel, and fold up for travel. They actually fit in my old Beats case!

        Connectivity and ease of set up: Honestly, this is where they blow Beats out of the water. The initial pair was an instant piece of cake. They connect by bluetooth and I never have problems with them being dropped from my phone. If I need to switch between devices for some reason, they never give me a hard time.

        The Price Point: You honestly cannot beat the quality you get for what you pay. If you want high-end sound and superior functionality without the "luxury" price tag, these are the ones to get. I had someone tell me that on a call, they sound better than my Beats and picked up less background sound!

        If you’re looking for a reliable, great-sounding pair of headphones and don't want to break the bank, look no further. Highly highly HIGHLY recommended!
        Read more

      • Becca
        5.0 out of 5 stars Great quality, comfort, and value
        Reviewed in the United States on January 24, 2026
        Color: GreenVerified Purchase
        I love these headphones! They work well even just for keeping out excess noise when I'm out in public but I don't feel like listening to any music. The audio quality is surrealistic that I have been watching a TV show, walked away from my phone and had to stop and take the headphones off to see if they were actually connected or if I was hearing this sound come out of my phone because I could hear in surround sound and wasn't expecting that. The pads are very comfortable and the adjustment hinges are very smooth and don't slide around or readjust on you with wear. I have fallen asleep with them on by accident and did not wake up with sore ears or a sore head. I love the colour and as a person with sensory issues, all of the parts were smooth to the touch and did not bother me. I also sincerely appreciate having the inner fabric marked as left and right because it saves me from having to look for a tiny marking on the outside like most headphones. I accidentally ordered two pairs and had to send one back but I am really impressed with the quality for the price. As a person who predominantly uses earbuds, they are a little bulky to fit in my purse, but they still fold up really nicely. I kind of wish I could buy them in every colour.
        Read more

        Translate review to English
      • Ahri
        5.0 out of 5 stars ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Great for the Price: Lightweight, Long Battery & Good Sound
        Reviewed in Canada on February 20, 2026
        Color: BlackVerified Purchase
        My Beats Studio Pros finally gave out after 10+ years. I’m currently not in the best financial state to replace them with the same ones so I decided to try these ones out for now!

        For what you’re paying, these headphones are honestly a great buy.

        First off, they came about 90% charged right out of the box, which was a nice surprise because I didn’t have to wait to test them. Pairing was super easy and quick, and I love that they can connect to two devices at once, really convenient.

        The 6 EQ modes make a difference. I personally love the Bass mode as it hits nicely without sounding muddy. You can switch depending on what you’re listening to, which is a cool feature at this price point.

        They’re very lightweight and comfortable. I wear them to the gym and they sit nicely without feeling heavy. I do sweat a lot during workouts, and I can’t say they’re sweat-proof (I doubt they are), so I just wipe them down before putting them in my bag. If you take care of your things, they should last. The quality reflects the price, but they’re durable if handled properly.

        I would said I have a bigger-than-average head, but these fit comfortably. It has quite a few adjustments.

        Battery life is great and lasts long depending on your usage. USB-C charging is a big plus. The volume buttons work well, and you can skip forward/backward by holding the buttons (not double tapping).

        Noise cancellation is minimal, so don’t expect premium ANC, but for everyday listening, gym use, or casual wear, they absolutely get the job done!
        Read more
        Ahri

      Product Summary: BERIBES Bluetooth Headphones Over Ear, 65H Playtime and 6 EQ Music Modes Wireless Headphones with Microphone, HiFi Stereo Foldable Lightweight Headset, Deep Bass for Home Office Cellphone PC Ect.

      From BERIBES

      4.5 out of 5 stars, 52,557 ratings

      Customer reviews

      10K+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: THB 855.01 10% Savings

      List Price: THB 954.44

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • 65 Hours Playtime: Low power consumption technology applied, BERIBES bluetooth headphones with built-in 500mAh battery can continually play more than 65 hours, standby more than 950 hours after one fully charge. By included 3.5mm audio cable, the wireless headphones over ear can be easily switched to wired mode when powers off. No power shortage problem anymore.
      • Optional 6 Music Modes: Adopted most advanced dual 40mm dynamic sound unit and 6 EQ modes, BERIBES updated headphones wireless bluetooth black were born for audiophiles. Simply switch the headphone between balanced sound, extra powerful bass and mid treble enhancement modes. No matter you prefer rock, Jazz, Rhythm & Blues or classic music, BERIBES has always been committed to providing our customers with good sound quality as the focal point of our engineering.
      • All Day Comfort: Made by premium materials, 0.38lb BERIBES over the ear headphones wireless bluetooth for work are the most lightweight headphones in the market. Adjustable headband makes it easy to fit all sizes heads without pains. Softer and more comfortable memory protein earmuffs protect your ears in long term using.
      • Latest Bluetooth 6.0 and Microphone: Carrying latest Bluetooth 6.0 chip, after booting, 1-3 seconds to quickly pair bluetooth. Beribes bluetooth headphones with microphone has faster and more stable transmitter range up to 33ft. Two smart devices can be connected to Beribes over-ear headphones at the same time, makes you able to pick up a call from your phones when watching movie on your pad without switching.（There are updates for both the old and new Bluetooth versions, but this will not affect the quality of the product or its normal use.）
      • Packaging Component: Package include a Foldable Deep Bass Headphone, 3.5MM Audio Cable, Type-c Charging Cable and User Manual.

      Product Description
